title: daphne uva-ursi
intro: Daphne uva-ursi, also known as bearberry or bear grape, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to Europe, Asia, and North America. The plant contains arbutin, a compound that is primarily responsible for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Daphne uva-ursi include its use in treating urinary tract infections, as it helps to reduce bacterial growth and inflammation in the urinary system, and its potential in alleviating symptoms of cystitis and other urinary disorders. Daphne uva-ursi can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in combination with other herbal remedies to enhance its therapeutic effects.
